name: Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in vanilla extract.
6. Pour mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F.
9. Continue baking for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
10. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
11. Chill completely.
12. Top with cherry pie filling just before serving.
